factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the model's hand and background.
The setting hints at lifestyle but does not show a clear use moment.
The image communicates a broad idea of new colors but lacks a specific benefit.
The layout has competing elements and weak spacing.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
No clear trust signal is visible in the image.
Some text is readable, but edges and subject boundaries are weak.
The image primarily reads as a marketplace listing without a clear campaign idea.
